name: Washing
description: Full machine wash with premium detergent. Gentle on fabrics, tough on stains.

name: Ironing
description: Professional steam ironing for wrinkle-free, crisp results every time.

name: Drying
description: Fast tumble drying that leaves your clothes soft and ready to fold.

name: Delivery
description: Doorstep pickup and delivery within your area, scheduled at your convenience.

name: Express Wash
description: Same-day rush washing for when you need clean clothes in a hurry.

name: Dry Cleaning
description: Specialized solvent cleaning for suits, coats, and delicate fabrics.

name: Stain Removal
description: Targeted treatment for tough stains like oil, wine, and grass.

name: Bedding Wash
description: Deep wash for duvets, comforters, and large bedding sets.

name: Curtain Cleaning
description: Gentle cleaning that preserves fabric and color in heavy curtains.

name: Shoe Cleaning
description: Hand-cleaned sneakers and shoes restored to a fresh, like-new look.

name: Carpet Cleaning
description: Deep steam cleaning to lift dirt and odors from rugs and carpets.

name: Suit Pressing
description: Sharp, crease-free pressing for suits and formal wear.

name: Duvet Cleaning
description: Specialized cleaning for thick duvets and winter blankets.

name: Leather Care
description: Conditioning and cleaning for leather jackets and bags.

name: Wedding Dress Care
description: Delicate cleaning and preservation for wedding gowns.

name: Starch & Press
description: Crisp starching and pressing for shirts and uniforms.
